message:
fix(ci): remove legacy asupersync sibling checkout from release.yml

asupersync 0.2.9 is resolved from crates.io (Cargo.lock source =
registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index), so the
../asupersync clone step is dead code.  actions/checkout@v6 now
rejects out-of-workspace paths, which caused all 5 build jobs to fail
in the v0.2.1 release run.  Drop the checkout and the corresponding
../asupersync entries from Swatinem/rust-cache workspaces in both the
build matrix and publish-crates jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,22 +52,13 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
-          path: ../asupersync
-
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
-          workspaces: |
-            . -> target
-            ../asupersync -> ../asupersync/target
 
       - name: Build release binary
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
@@ -157,20 +148,11 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
-          path: ../asupersync
-
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           key: publish-${{ runner.os }}
-          workspaces: |
-            . -> target
-            ../asupersync -> ../asupersync/target
 
       - name: Ensure crates.io token
         if: ${{ env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN == '' }}
